description: Pilot — demoniac vs Jesus; power went out from Him
mustContain: When he saw Jesus from afar, he ran and bowed down to Him
For He said to him, “Come out of the man, you unclean spirit!”
perceiving in Himself that the power had gone out from Him
He didn’t allow him, but said to him
mustNotContain: When He saw Jesus from afar, He ran
For he said to him, “Come out of the man
perceiving in himself that the power had gone out from him
He didn’t allow Him, but said to Him
